leadText: The Roto Boost (Japanese: おうえんポン Roto Boost) is a Rotom Power introduced in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag during battle, it raises the Attack , Defense , Special Attack , Special Defense and Speed of the Pokémon currently in battle by one stage each.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA One of the Rotom Powers. It raises all stats of your battling Pokémon. S V ZA One of the Rotom Powers. When used, it boosts all stats for your battling Pokémon.
